# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a VPC with public and private subnets for our three-tier application. Configure basic routing and internet gateway. Keep networking simple for rapid deployment - we'll add VPC flow logs and monitoring later.
# Category: cloud_network_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPC'
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    DependsOn: VPC
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    DependsOn: VPC
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.11.0/24

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    DependsOn: VPC
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.13.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    DependsOn: VPC
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.15.0/24

  InternetGateway:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::InternetGateway'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment'
    DependsOn: VPC
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  RouteTablePublic:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::RouteTable'
    DependsOn: VPC
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  RouteTablePrivate:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::RouteTable'
    DependsOn: VPC
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  RoutesPublic:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Route'
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTablePublic
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  RoutesPrivate:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Route'
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTablePrivate
      GatewayId: !GetAtt VPCGatewayAttachment.GatewayId

  SubnetRouteTableAssociationPublic1:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation'
    DependsOn: RoutesPublic
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTablePublic

  SubnetRouteTableAssociationPrivate1:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation'
    DependsOn: RoutesPrivate
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTablePrivate

  SubnetRouteTableAssociationPublic2:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation'
    DependsOn: RoutesPublic
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTablePublic

  SubnetRouteTableAssociationPrivate2:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation'
    DependsOn: RoutesPrivate
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTablePrivate
